products.title: Solid Nail Glue Gel
products.bodyHtml:
THIS PRODUCT MUST BE CURED WITH A UV LAMP.

Our specialized solid nail glue gel(10ml) is a game changer. Just apply it to your natural nails and cure it with our handheld UV lamp to enjoy a robust wear time of 15-30 days.

Check out our ProTouch Kit for a bundle of two solid nail glue gels and one handheld UV lamp.

Ingredients: Acrylates, Polymethyl methacrylate, Copolymer.

products.title: Ersa Cuticle Oil
products.bodyHtml: Nourish, protect, and rejuvenate with our Ersa Cuticle Oil. Expertly formulated with a blend of natural oils, vitamins, and botanical extracts, this cuticle oil not only moisturizes the delicate skin around your nails but also promotes strong, healthy nail growth. Its lightweight, non-greasy texture is absorbed quickly, delivering hydration and a natural shine instantly. Regular use of the Ersa Cuticle Oil ensures your nails and cuticles stay soft, healthy, and free from hangnails and dryness. Elevate your nail care routine and indulge in the luxurious benefits of our premium cuticle oil.

products.title: Customization Request
products.bodyHtml:
Please chat with our customer service to discuss your custom requirements before placing an order. Size range: 17mm-8mm.

This customization fee is per set. If you are looking to customize more than one set, please add the number of customization requests equal to the number of sets.

Do you want to change the nail shape or length of our designs? Or even change up some elements on the nails, like removing a charm? We got you!

Ersa Nails offers an exclusive customization service that allows you to add a personal touch to our existing range of exquisite press-on nails. By consulting with our dedicated customer service team, you can fine-tune the details of your chosen design to match your unique style preferences.

products.title: Lotus Fairy
products.bodyHtml:
NAIL SHAPE: Long Almond
APPROX. LENGTH: 23-28MM
The Lotus Fairy press-on nails set is an exquisite embodiment of purity and grace. Inspired by the noble lotus, known as the "gentleman of flowers," this set captures the essence of its untainted beauty with a design that celebrates the lotus's symbolic resistance to corruption. The nails feature hand-painted lotus blossoms that seem to float atop a serene, opalescent base, reminiscent of calm waters. The use of iridescent coatings and delicate brushwork creates a finish that's both ethereal and resilient, much like the lotus flower itself, and the mermaid elements evoke a sense of enchanting depth and mystery.

products.title: Custom Nail Design
products.bodyHtml:
Introducing Ersa Nail's exclusive Custom Design Service – where your vision for the perfect nails is sculpted into reality by our master artisans. Embrace the luxury of personal expression and elevate your nail art to a bespoke masterpiece crafted just for you.

How it works:

  1. Inspiration: Begin your bespoke journey by sharing a photo of your dream nail design. Whether it's inspired by an exquisite pattern, a momentous occasion, or a reflection of your unique style, your inspiration will be the blueprint of our creation.

  2. Consultation: Our design team will collaborate with you to ensure every detail is captured. After evaluating the design, we will provide you with the estimated price and crafting time for your design. 

  3. Craftsmanship: With the design set, our skilled nail artists will meticulously handcraft your custom set, utilizing only the finest materials and paying close attention to the nuances that make your design uniquely yours.

  4. Preview: Before we finalize your custom set, we'll provide a preview to ensure it aligns with your expectations. Your satisfaction is paramount, and this step guarantees that the final product will be exactly as you envisioned.

  5. Delivery: Your custom nail set will be delivered to your doorstep, ready to adorn your hands and express your individuality. Each set comes in a luxurious package, reflecting the exclusivity and elegance of the bespoke service.

Timeline: The estimated crafting time for custom sets is about two weeks.

products.title: Nails Refill Services
products.bodyHtml:
Please chat with our customer service to discuss your requirements before placing an order.

Introducing Ersa Nails’ Nails Refill Services, your bespoke solution for those little mishaps that life throws your way. We understand that sometimes a favorite nail from your cherished set may go missing or face an unexpected damage. That’s where our Replacement Service steps in to bring your complete set back to perfection.

How to Use Our Nails Refill Services:

  • Reach out to our dedicated customer service team with details of the nail set and the specific nails that need replacing.
  • Our team will provide you with a quote based on the style and complexity of the design.
  • Once confirmed, we craft your replacements with the same care and quality as your original set.
  • Your nail replacements are then shipped directly to you, ready to wear and enjoy.

products.title: Ersa Removal Pen
products.bodyHtml:
Designed for our solid glue. DOES NOT WORK ON REGULAR NAIL GLUE.

Introducing the Removal Pen by Ersa Nails, your ultimate tool for hassle-free nail removal. Designed for efficiency and ease, this pen streamlines the process with simple steps:

  1. Make sure the tip of the pen is face down.
  2. Gently insert the pen into the edges of the nail tips.
  3. Click and inject the nail remover into the edge.
  4. Insert and inject the remover to the other side.
  5. Gently lift and twist the nail tip to loosen the grip.
  6. Press and inject more remover until peeled off.
This removal pen is used for removing our stciky tabs and solid nail glue gel, not for regular liquid nail glue.

Ingredients: isohexadecane, Simmondsia Chinensis

products.title: Solid Glue Tabs
products.bodyHtml:
NOTE: The tabs have to be cured by a UV lamp.

The Solid Glue Tabs come in a pack with 5 sheets (24 pieces per sheet), designed for easy application and long-lasting wear. These tabs are reinforced with a UV lamp for secure adhesion and are perfect for keeping your press-on nails in place for longer. To ensure the best results, avoid excessive heat, humidity, and sun exposure.

Instructions for Use:
1. Wipe your nail bed with alcohol or aqua pads
2. Choose a right size of tab and apply it on your nail bed
3. Press down the tab to remove any bubble
4. Peel the plastic backing off and press the nails down at a 45° angle
5. Use the UV lamp to fully cure each nail for at least 1 minute

Care Tips:
To ensure the best results, avoid excessive heat, humidity, and direct sun exposure, as these conditions may affect the adhesive's performance.

products.title: Petals of Eternity
products.bodyHtml:
Inspired by the delicate artistry of blue and white porcelain, Petals of Eternity brings to life the timeless beauty of traditional Chinese motifs. products.title: Miaojiang Girl
products.bodyHtml:
Inspired by the vibrant traditions of the Miao ethnic group in southwestern China, Miaojiang Girl beautifully merges heritage and modern elegance. With a striking blend of blue and black tones, this set of nails is adorned with intricate Miao-style patterns, showcasing the timeless beauty of traditional Miao clothing. Drawing from the rich cultural history, the nails are further enhanced with headpiece-inspired embellishments, reminiscent of the stunning Miao silver adornments that have long symbolized prosperity, beauty, and strength. Miaojiang Girl captures the spirit of the Snake Year, infusing the nails with both mystique and boldness, making it a unique tribute to the vibrant Miao culture and Chinese heritage. Perfect for those who appreciate intricate craftsmanship and the elegance of ethnic design, Miaojiang Girl is a celebration of tradition, power, and grace.
NAIL SHAPE: Medium Almond
APPROX. LENGTH: 18-25MM

products.title: Ersa Magic Glue
products.bodyHtml:
• Brush-on Nail Glue: 
The secret to a flawless manicure that lasts. Designed for press-on nails, Ersa Nails Brush-on Nail Glue offers a smooth brush applicator for easy, mess-free application. Its strong, professional-grade formula keeps your nails securely in place for up to 8 weeks, so you can enjoy long-lasting, salon-quality nails at home.

products.title: Emerald Memory
products.bodyHtml:
A deep, velvety emerald base flashes with cold fire, as if cathedral stained glass were liquefied and poured across the nail. Micro-veins of antique gold leaf drift through the colour like old illumination flaking from a missal—every tilt of your hand rewrites the page. A whisper of translucence at the free edge mimics the ghost-line of a memory half recalled, so the manicure feels less worn and more unearthed: a jewel dug out of attic trunks, still humming with the last music it heard before the lights went out.

APPROX LENGTH: 18 - 25MM

products.title: Pure Crush
products.bodyHtml:
Ersa Nails' Pure Crush it arrives like a text you weren’t supposed to get—three dots, then silence, then the aftershock of possibility. Everything is hypothetical and urgent: elevator doors held a second too long, a smile passed like contraband in fluorescent light. Nothing has happened yet everything is already lit, already loud inside your ribs.

products.title: Flourishing
products.bodyHtml:
NAIL SHAPE: Medium Almond
APPROX. LENGTH: 18 - 25MM
Inspired by the timeless elegance of traditional Chinese mother-of-pearl inlay techniques, Flourishing from Ersa Nails features a striking combination of deep navy and shimmering gold, adorned with delicate floral designs. This set evokes the beauty of intricate, handcrafted inlay work often seen on ancient artifacts such as vases and decorative objects. The design is further enhanced by the captivating sheen of mother-of-pearl, which reflects the artistry and attention to detail that defines this traditional craft. Perfect for adding sophistication and cultural elegance to any occasion.

Inspired by the intricate beauty of Chinese lacquer inlay work and the symbolic elegance of the Ruyi, Ruyi Bliss by Ersa Nails captures the essence of traditional Chinese craftsmanship. The set features deep black and rich gold tones, accented with delicate, flowing motifs that evoke the mother-of-pearl inlay often seen on antique Chinese lacquerware. The Ruyi, traditionally a curved ceremonial scepter, symbolizes good fortune, power, and the fulfillment of wishes. products.title: All The Best
products.bodyHtml:
The All The Best Bundle includes all 17 designs from the Heirloom Reverie Collection by Ersa Nails, each inspired by the incredible treasures of the Palace Museum in Beijing. Drawing from traditional crafts like Cloisonné enamel, inlay work, feather inlay, gold-inlaid jade, and porcelain, this collection reinterprets ancient techniques with modern artistry. Each set is thoughtfully designed and crafted by co-founder Valentina.
This bundle is a celebration of China’s rich cultural heritage, transforming timeless treasures from the Palace Museum into wearable works of art. With All The Best, Ersa Nails honors the extraordinary craftsmanship and rare artifacts that have been passed down through generations.

products.title: Bluish Tide
products.bodyHtml:
NAIL SHAPE: Medium Almond
APPROX. LENGTH: 18 - 25MM
Bluish Tide from Ersa Nails brings a refreshing ocean inspired look with soft nude tones, clear aqua blues, deep sea accents, and delicate pearl details. These press on nails feature wave like gradients, blooming blue florals, starfish charms, glossy finishes, and subtle gold embellishments that create a dreamy seaside vibe. Perfect for those who love clean summer energy with a touch of mermaid elegance, these reusable nails blend artistic detail with easy wear and lasting comfort. Whether you are packing for a beach getaway or adding a cool, ocean washed glow to your everyday style, Bluish Tide nails deliver the perfect balance of freshness, softness, and coastal charm.
